title: Skills
subtitle: A breakdown of my technical expertise and the personal strengths I bring to every team and project.

hardSkills.title: Hard Skills
hardSkills.description:
Technologies, tools, and frameworks I've built professional experience with.
More information about each skill can be read clicking on them.

filter.mostRelevantTooltip: A reduced number of skills is presented to prevent old usages from adding noise to your read. If all skills are desired to be viewed select this checkbox.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: Can jump right in without difficulties nor causing tech debt.

solid.name: Solid
solid.description: Guaranteed autonomy, but some catch up first would be appreciated.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Will make it work, but most likely cause some tech debt in the process.

rusty.name: Rusty
rusty.description: Has passed more than a year since last use.

blurry.name: Blurry
blurry.description: Hard to tell when it was used for the last time.

softSkills.title: Soft Skills
softSkills.description:
Personal traits and interpersonal abilities that shape how I work and collaborate.
More information about each skill can be read clicking on them.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: Taking full responsibility for projects and outcomes, proactively driving work forward, making decisions, and ensuring things get done without needing constant direction.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: Guiding projects from idea to delivery, and helping teams move in the right direction with clarity and confidence.

mentorshipTeamDevelopment.title: Mentorship & team development
mentorshipTeamDevelopment.description: Supporting teammates' growth through guidance, feedback, and knowledge sharing, while fostering a collaborative and inclusive environment.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Clearly expressing ideas and translating complex technical concepts into understandable terms for different audiences, from engineers to stakeholders.

problemSolving.title: Problem solving
problemSolving.description: Approaching challenges with structured thinking, analyzing root causes, and finding efficient, scalable solutions rather than quick fixes.

adaptability-learning.title: Adaptability & Learning
adaptability-learning.description: Quickly adjusting to new technologies, tools, and environments while continuously improving skills and staying curious.

reliability-work-ethic.title: Reliability & Work ethic
reliability-work-ethic.description: Being consistent, accountable, and dependable—delivering quality work on time and taking responsibility for results.

collaboration-team-mindset.title: Collaboration & Team mindset
collaboration-team-mindset.description: Working effectively with others, valuing different perspectives, and contributing to a positive and productive team dynamic.

emotional-intelligence.title: Emotional intelligence
emotional-intelligence.description: Understanding and managing your own emotions while being aware of others', enabling better communication, empathy, and decision-making.

conflictResolution.title: Conflict resolution
conflictResolution.description: Handling disagreements constructively, focusing on solutions, and maintaining healthy working relationships even in challenging situations.
